summary: Early-career AI/ML engineer with hands-on experience designing and deploying LLM agents and RAG workflows to automate complex, manual processes, and implementing models in PyTorch for production inference. Comfortable owning problems end-to-end from data pipeline construction through containerized deployment and monitoring on cloud infrastructure. Strong foundation in data structures, algorithms, and software engineering, with a track record of shipping in fast-paced, collaborative environments.

skills.ml: PyTorch, TensorFlow, LLMs (Claude, GPT-4o), GenAI Agents, RAG, LangChain, HuggingFace Transformers, DistilBERT, XGBoost, YOLO, SHAP, Captum, Vector Embeddings, Pinecone
skills.infra: Docker, Kubernetes, GCP, AWS, Railway, Supabase (PostgreSQL, Row-Level Security), GitHub Actions CI/CD, Vercel, REST APIs, FastAPI, Express

experience.title: Deep Learning Intern
bullets: Developed a YOLO-based object detection model in Python to detect and classify industrial pipe inventory from warehouse images, improving accuracy by 30% and eliminating a fully manual counting process.

Built a data augmentation pipeline using NumPy and Pandas, scaling the training dataset from a few hundred to 10,000+ images and manually re-annotating 500+ edge cases; accuracy improved from 65% to 85.4% on held-out evaluation data.
Containerized the model with Docker and deployed on Kubernetes for horizontal scaling of model inference, monitoring performance and enabling the team to handle variable load without code changes.
Designed normalized relational database schemas in SQL to store image metadata and inference results, enabling cross-team queries on model performance and inventory trends.

projects.name: AI Interview Engine
projects.subtitle: Voice-First Candidate Screening Platform
projects.stack: Next.js, Express, Claude Sonnet/Haiku, Deepgram, Supabase, Railway, Vercel
bullets: Designed and deployed an LLM agent that conducts multi-turn candidate interviews with dynamic context injection, automating a manual screening process: the agent receives each candidate's parsed resume before the session and generates targeted, role-specific follow-up questions in real time.

Engineered a real-time voice pipeline integrating Deepgram Nova-2 (speech-to-text) and Aura (text-to-speech) with Claude Sonnet 4.6 (LLM), achieving 4-5s end-to-end latency per conversational turn in production.

Built an automated document ingestion pipeline (PDF parsing, Claude Haiku, MD5 deduplication caching) and a post-interview evaluation agent scoring candidates across 4 dimensions with advance/hold/reject output; deployed full-stack on Railway, Vercel, and Supabase (PostgreSQL with Row-Level Security and Magic Link authentication) with Brevo SMTP for transactional email automation.

projects.name: CodeSyntax AI
projects.subtitle: Full-Stack RAG Developer Assistant
projects.stack: Python, FastAPI, Next.js, LangChain, Pinecone, Docker, GitHub Actions
bullets: Built a production retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) workflow using GPT-4o-mini with semantic search over Python Docs, RealPython, and StackOverflow, indexed in Pinecone via OpenAI vector embeddings.

Implemented an LLM-based query intent classifier and result re-ranker by source authority, plus multi-turn conversation support via LangChain chat-history condensing, both measurably reducing off-topic responses.

Maintained 35+ pytest unit tests and a 55-question domain evaluation set; GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline builds the Docker image and deploys to Railway (API) and Vercel (frontend) on every merge to main.

projects.name: AuthentiText
projects.subtitle: AI-Generated Text Detection Engine
projects.stack: Python, PyTorch, XGBoost, DistilBERT, HuggingFace, GCP, Docker
bullets: Trained a weighted ensemble model combining XGBoost (21 hand-crafted linguistic features: perplexity, burstiness, lexical density) with a fine-tuned DistilBERT transformer implemented in PyTorch, achieving 99.1% F1 and 99.96% AUROC on held-out test data.

Conducted systematic model comparison across four architectures (Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost, DistilBERT) using ROC curves, confusion matrices, and SHAP feature importance; integrated Captum token-level attribution heatmaps for explainable AI (XAI).
Trained on the merged HC3 corpus spanning Wikipedia, Reddit, medicine, and finance domains; deployed and monitored as a publicly accessible machine learning inference app on HuggingFace Spaces.
